metadata.title: jperdior — Notes
metadata.description: A spec-driven Symfony + Next.js template demo.

common.appDescription: Spec-driven Symfony + Next.js + JWT auth. Add your own bounded contexts on top.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.invalidEmailOrPassword: Email is invalid or password is too short.
auth.accountExists: An account with this email already exists.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to set a new one.
auth.resetLinkSent: If an account with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent. The link is valid for 1 hour.
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: You must set a new password before continuing.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.setNewPasswordDescription: Choose a strong password you have not used elsewhere.
auth.invalidResetRequest: Invalid request. Please request a new password reset.
auth.invalidResetLink: This password reset link is invalid.
auth.expiredResetLink: This password reset link has expired or has already been used.
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
